diagrams.title: Three Categories of Software Myths
diagrams.description: A Venn diagram showing three overlapping circles for Management, Customer, and Practitioner myths with example myths in each section
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize how myths are categorized and identify which category specific beliefs belong to

diagrams.title: Brooks' Law Effect
diagrams.description: A line graph showing project completion time vs number of programmers added, demonstrating that beyond a certain point, adding more programmers increases delay
elements: Curve showing initial decrease then sharp increase
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates why adding resources to late projects makes them later

diagrams.title: Iron Triangle Diagram
diagrams.description: A triangle with three vertices labeled Scope, Time, and Cost with arrows showing how changing one affects the others
diagrams.purpose: Visualize project management tradeoffs and understand constraints
